habitat: Open woodland; parks; agricultural country; downlands; heaths; and areas near water
story: Explore the fascinating world of the Eurasian Hobby (Falco subbuteo). Classified under the Falconidae family, this bird predominantly inhabits Open woodland; parks; agricultural country; downlands; heaths; and areas near water. The current IUCN classification of Least Concern (LC) underscores the importance of safeguarding its natural range. From its feeding habits to its nesting preferences, the Eurasian Hobby is a testament to the intricate web of life. By studying species like the Eurasian Hobby, we gain valuable insights into broader ecological trends.
Every poster is crafted to inspire curiosity about our planet's incredible biodiversity.
